text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass doors beckon me into a space dedicated to research and development—R+D—where creativity and knowledge are showcased. It is a sanctuary of human ingenuity, and I cannot help but ponder the nature of innovation itself. Surrounded by text, technology, and ideas, I feel both inspired and humbled, aware of the endless possibilities that arise when thought and experimentation converge.
